
# User Story

As an exporter

I need each header page in the Fish Export Service (FES) that refers to "Storage document" to now refer to "Non-manipulation document"

So that I can see that I have chosen the correct journey for the document I wish to correct

## Acceptance Criteria

### Scenario 1 - Progress page updated

- Given I have navigated to any page in my Non-Manipulation Document user journey
- When the page loads then the black banner at the top of the page where the Gov UK logo is ‘Create a UK non-manipulation document', currently says 'Create a UK storage document'
- And the url link for the above navigates to page `/create-storage-document/storage-documents` which is waht it is now but we need to ensure it remains the same

### Scenario 2 - Welsh translations

- Given I have navigated to any page in my Non-Manipulation document user journey
- When I have selected Welsh language
- Then the heading in the banner is translated to Welsh

**English text**
Create a UK non-manipulation document

**Welsh translation**
Creu dogfen dim triniaeth ar gyfer y DU

### Scenario 3 - Changes reflected when navigating from Admin app

- Given I have accessed the non-manipulation document journey via the Admin app, `mmo-fes-internal-admin-fe`

- When I navigate to any page then the black banner at the top of the page where the Gov UK logo is ‘Create a UK non-manipulation document' And the url link navigates to page `/create-storage-document/storage-documents`

### Scenario 4 - Update tests as appropriate
- Update test where appropriate
